```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement security compliance automation (SOC2, GDPR)"
---
# Compliance Automation
## Task
Automate security compliance checks.
## Requirements
1. Map controls to frameworks (SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA). 2. Automate evidence collection.
3. Run compliance checks in CI/CD. 4. Generate compliance reports.
5. Track remediation of non-compliant items.
## Constraints
- Compliance checks must not block development velocity excessively. Report, don't just fail.
## Success Criteria
- Controls mapped to frameworks. Evidence automated. Reports generated. Issues tracked.
```
